user.title: Medication Stock Manager
user.description:
Set up a self-contained medication and medical-supply manager.
You can optionally create its integration-owned configuration page in the Home Assistant sidebar.

data.show_sidebar_panel: Show configuration page in the sidebar
data.sidebar_require_admin: Only administrators can open the sidebar page

owner.title: Create the first owner
owner.description:
The integration creates an owner device and medication calendar.
Notification entity fields are optional and accept comma-separated notify entity IDs.

data.name: Owner name
data.auto_create_person: Create a Person when none matches

abort.single_instance_allowed: Medication Stock Manager is already configured.

init.title: Medication Stock Manager options
init.description:
Configure the integration-owned sidebar page.
Changes are applied when the integration reloads.

data.show_sidebar_panel: Show Medication Stock in the sidebar
data.sidebar_require_admin: Only administrators can open the sidebar page

set_sidebar_options.name: Set sidebar options
set_sidebar_options.description: Enable, disable, or customize the Medication Stock sidebar page.

move_item.name: Move item
move_item.description: Move an item up or down within its owner and medication/supply category.
